channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Joint SANDF and SAPS Operation Launched to Target Organised Crime in Crime Hotspots
item.description: South Africa’s government has launched a coordinated effort to stabilise regions plagued by organised crime, with the SANDF supporting SAPS in targeted operations. National Police Commissioner Fannie ...

item.title: Seven Tamil Nadu pilgrims die and seven injured in road mishap in Nepal
item.description: On Saturday, 14th March 2026, a tragic road accident occurred in the Gorkha district of Nepal involving a group of 24 pilgrims from Pollachi and Devakottai in Tamil Nadu. The pilgrims were travelling ...

item.title: Pastor Chris Okafor Explains Divorce from First Wife Due to Infidelity Discovery
item.description: Pastor Chris Okafor, di founder of Grace Nation Global wey dem dey also call Liberation City, don open up about why him first marriage crash. For one interview wey him grant Vanguard, di pastor talk s...

item.title: Tori Spelling Addresses Decades of Misleading Plastic Surgery Rumors
item.description: Tori Spelling, the star of 'Beverly Hills, 90210,' spoke openly about decades of false rumors claiming she had undergone extensive plastic surgery. She revealed that at age 17, tabloids, including The...

item.title: Living with prostate cancer and the debate over NHS screening
item.description: Prostate cancer is now the most commonly diagnosed cancer in the UK, with nearly 65,000 cases recorded in 2022 and around 12,200 deaths a year. The article follows several men, including David Bulteel...

item.title: Complete Guide to Bukura Agricultural College Courses, Fees and Application Process
item.description: Bukura Agricultural College (BAC) is a well-established middle-level institution in Kenya, specialising in agricultural training since 1974. It offers a variety of certificate and diploma courses in a...

item.title: Federal government declares public holidays for Eidul Fitr on March 20 and 21
item.description: The federal government has officially announced public holidays for offices on March 20 and 21, 2026, in observance of Eidul Fitr. According to a notification issued by the Cabinet Division, this appl...

item.title: Poilievre outlines plan for tariff-free auto trade to revitalise Canadian vehicle production
item.description: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre has unveiled a plan aimed at revitalising Canada's auto sector by proposing a tariff-free trade agreement with the United States. The plan, announced during a visi...

item.title: Israeli strike kills 12 medics at health centre in southern Lebanon amid escalating conflict
item.description: An Israeli missile strike devastated a four-storey health centre in Burj Qalaouiyah, southern Lebanon, killing at least 12 medics who served 20 nearby villages with emergency ambulances, a pharmacy, a...

item.title: Highlights from the 2026 Oscars Red Carpet Fashion
item.description: The 98th Academy Awards have commenced, showcasing some of the most glamorous fashion seen this year. Celebrities arrived at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles dressed in stunning evening attire, from c...

item.title: Gov. Adeleke Says Tinubu Dey Use Federal Power for Good Governance, Not Election Rigging
item.description: Governor Ademola Adeleke of Osun State don make am clear say President Bola Tinubu no dey use federal power take pursue political opponents. According to the Governor, Tinubu dey use the authority wey...

item.title: Congo-Brazzaville holds elections with president expected to remain in power
item.description: Congo-Brazzaville recently held national elections amid a political climate dominated by the current president, who is widely expected to extend his time in office. Observers have noted that the elect...

item.title: Freenet Debuts Redesigned Peer-to-Peer Network and Decentralized Group Chat 'River'
item.description: Freenet, the peer-to-peer platform originally created in 2000 by Ian Clarke, has launched a completely redesigned network aimed at supporting real-time decentralized applications. Unlike its predecess...

item.title: Dennis Cometti’s Family Express Gratitude Following Tributes to AFL Broadcasting Legend
item.description: The family of Dennis Cometti, the celebrated Australian footy commentator, have expressed deep gratitude for the heartfelt tributes pouring in from fans, fellow commentators, and even Prime Minister A...

item.title: One Killed, 13 Injured in Shalimar Express Collision with Goods Train in Naushahro Feroze, Inquiry Ordered
item.description: On Sunday, March 15, 2026, the Lahore-bound Shalimar Express collided with a stationary goods train at Lakha Road Railway Station in Naushahro Feroze district, Sindh. The accident happened when the in...

item.title: ACT-Wazalendo and CCM make steady progress in Zanzibar political talks
item.description: In Zanzibar, ACT-Wazalendo party, under its national chairman Othman Masoud Othman (OMO), dey optimistic say political reconciliation with ruling CCM dey move well. OMO, while talking to members and c...

item.title: Weather Forecast: Rain Expected in Select Counties While Most of Kenya Remains Dry
item.description: Nairobi – The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued the daily weather forecast covering 24 hours from 9pm Sunday, March 15, to 9pm Monday, March 16. Most parts of the country will enjoy sun...

item.title: Shalimar Express collides with parked goods train in Naushahro Feroze, one killed
item.description: On Sunday, the Lahore-bound Shalimar Express met with an unfortunate accident at Lakha Road Railway Station in Naushahro Feroze, Sindh. According to local authorities, one person lost his life, identi...

item.title: Edo Lawmaker Urges Lawmakers to Engage Constituents Beyond Assembly Walls
item.description: Anamero Dekeri, wey dey represent Etsako Federal Constituency for House of Representatives, don talk say make legislative work no just stop for National Assembly debates alone. Over weekend for Abuja,...

item.title: Oscars 2026 live coverage: red carpet arrivals, fashion, political statements and ceremony updates
item.description: The Guardian's live blog for the 98th Academy Awards on 15 March 2026 captures the excitement surrounding Hollywood's biggest night, hosted once again by Conan O’Brien. The ceremony promises a more po...
